allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('version:', j.version\); console.log\('peerDeps:', JSON.stringify\(j.peerDependencies\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\); const p=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('main:', p.main\); console.log\('exports:', JSON.stringify\(p.exports, null, 2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const m = require\('@medusajs/file-s3'\); console.log\('keys:', Object.keys\(m\)\); console.log\('default:', typeof m.default\); console.log\('module:', typeof m.S3FileService || typeof m.default\)")

Bash(curl -o /dev/null -s -w 'DNS lookup: %{time_namelookup}s\\nTCP connect: %{time_connect}s\\nTLS handshake: %{time_appconnect}s\\nFirst byte: %{time_starttransfer}s\\nTotal: %{time_total}s\\nHTTP status: %{http_code}\\n' https://xozqnlivqhmhgwjltkdz.storage.supabase.co/storage/v1/bucket)

Bash(curl -o /dev/null -s -w 'DNS: %{time_namelookup}s | TCP: %{time_connect}s | TLS: %{time_appconnect}s | TTFB: %{time_starttransfer}s | Total: %{time_total}s\\n' https://xozqnlivqhmhgwjltkdz.supabase.co)

Bash(curl -o /dev/null -s -w 'Storage S3 — DNS: %{time_namelookup}s  TCP connect: %{time_connect}s  TLS: %{time_appconnect}s  TTFB: %{time_starttransfer}s  Total: %{time_total}s  Status: %{http_code}\\n' https://xozqnlivqhmhgwjltkdz.storage.supabase.co/storage/v1/bucket)
